TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pasikau ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 332 buwan, 1,145 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 1,021 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 124 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 第11 . qalang Pasikau ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Pasikau ga maki 1 khu skwan biru. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pasikau hya' ga Talunas. tay 'zil na Pasikau hya' ga Kainisungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pasikau ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pas~ɕikau ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, *** . qalaŋ pas~ɕikau ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ pas~ɕikau ɣa maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕikau ħjaʔ ɣa talunas~ɕ. taj ʔzil na pas~ɕikau ħjaʔ ɣa kainis~ɕuŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pas~ɕikau ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pasikau ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 332 buwan, 1,145 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 1,021 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 124 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 第11 . qalang Pasikau ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Pasikau ga maki 1 khu skwan biru. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pasikau hya' ga Talunas. tay 'zil na Pasikau hya' ga Kainisungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pasikau ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pas~ɕikau ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, *** . qalaŋ pas~ɕikau ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ pas~ɕikau ɣa maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na pas~ɕikau ħjaʔ ɣa talunas~ɕ. taj ʔzil na pas~ɕikau ħjaʔ ɣa kainis~ɕuŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pas~ɕikau ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
